lines.speaker: Sebamo
lines.text: Welcome, adventurer. Are you looking for a sublime staff? I'm afraid a little issue with some ents means I don't have any battlestaffs for sale, but other than that, I'm sure I'll have what you need.

lines.speaker: Sebamo
lines.text: Unfortunately, we had someone new handling the delivery and they accidently left the cart in the way of the ents. I think the ents must have then considered both the cart and its contents to be a gift for them.

lines.speaker: Sebamo
lines.text: I wouldn't say stole. I just think they misunderstood why the cart had been left there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you not ask for them back?

lines.speaker: Sebamo
lines.text: I'm sure the courier tried, but I suspect the ents didn't really understand him.

lines.speaker: Sebamo
lines.text: Anyway, would you like to buy a staff?

lines.speaker: Sebamo
lines.text: Tetamo, iknami! I hope you change your mind soon!

lines.speaker: Sebamo
lines.text: Tetamo, iknami! I hope you change your mind soon!
